subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God and maidservant of the True One! Hearken unto the voice of the Wronged One, Who from the Most Great Prison hath turned toward thee and summoneth thee unto truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله و ای کنیز حق بشنو ندای مظلوم را که از سجن اعظم بتو توجه نموده و ترا بحق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
